The prize money for 2025 is set at Swedish kronor (SEK) 11.0 million per full Nobel Prize."},{"url":"https://worldpopulationreview.com/country-rankings/nobel-prizes-by-country","title":"Nobel Prizes by Country 2026","content":"Varying criteria for attribution, such as counting laureates with multiple affiliations in more than one country or category.
Some sources may include or exclude organizational Peace Prize winners or count shared prizes differently.
Nobel Prizes are awarded in five areas: peace, literature, physics, chemistry, and physiology or medicine.
Germany has won the next highest number of prizes with 115 and is the third of the only three countries with more than 100 Nobel laureates.
Her award was added to the totals of both the United States and the Philippines.
As of 2024, winners of the Nobel Prize receive a medal, a diploma, and prize money totaling 11 million Swedish Krona (roughly $1,044,255 USD).
Once all nominations have been received (by January 31 of a given year), the Nobel Committee narrows the list to 300 potential winners and delivers a list of the nominees, as well as a report detailing their candidacy, to the institutions that award each prize."},{"url":"https://www.nobelprize.org/prizes/lists/all-nobel-prizes/","title":"All Nobel Prizes - NobelPrize.org","content":"Between 1901 and 2025, the Nobel Prizes and the Sveriges Riksbank Prize in Economic Sciences in Memory of Alfred Nobel were awarded 633 times to 1,026 people and organisations.
With some receiving the Nobel Prize more than once, this makes a total of 990 individuals and 28 organisations.
Below, you can view the full list of Nobel Prizes and Nobel Prize laureates."},{"url":"https://www.weforum.org/stories/emerging-technologies/nobel-prize-winners-2024/","title":"These are the Nobel Prize winners of 2024 | World Economic Forum","content":"From economics to physics, literature to peace, here's what you need to know about this year's Nobel laureates and their foundational work to address the world's biggest challenges.
All six Nobel Prize winners for 2024 have now been announced.
The three Chemistry laureates were all awarded for their work with proteins – and artificial intelligence (AI).
AI pioneers John Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton were both awarded the Physics prize, for using tools to develop methods that are the foundation of today’s machine learning.
Hopfield, a professor emeritus at Princeton University, and at 91, the oldest Physics Nobel laureate ever awarded, created an associative memory that can store and reconstruct images and other types of patterns in data."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Nobel_Peace_Prize","title":"2026 Nobel Peace Prize - Wikipedia","content":"The 2026 Nobel Peace Prize is an international peace prize established according to Alfred Nobel's will that will be announced on 9 October 2026 by the Norwegian Nobel Committee in Oslo, Norway, and awarded on 10 December 2026.
"European Parliament lawmaker nominates Francesca Albanese, Gaza doctors for 2026 Nobel Peace Prize"."},{"url":"https://www.globalbankingandfinance.com/factbox-2024-nobel-prizes-announced-this-week/","title":"Factbox-2024 Nobel prizes announced this week","content":"Oct 7, 2024 — come with a prize amount of 11 million Swedish crowns ($1.1 million) ($1 = 10.1509 Swedish crowns)"}]}

On 27 November 1895, a year before his death, Alfred Nobel signed the famous will which would implement some of the goals to which he had devoted so much of his life. Nobel stipulated in his will that most of his estate, more than SEK 31 million (today approximately SEK 2,2 billion) should be converted into a fund and invested in “safe securities.”. The income from the investments was to be “distributed annually in the form of prizes to those who during the preceding year have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.” The table below shows the prize money in Swedish kronor (SEK) through the years, the monetary value per December 2023 in Swedish kronor (SEK) and the value in % compared to the original amount in 1901. The prize money for 2025 is set at Swedish kronor (SEK) 11.0 million per full Nobel Prize.
